title: Cursed Island
description: Can you survive the horror lurking?
body:
_**Made to push the difficulty of horror mods...**_

ATTENTION ATTENTION please make sure to use the seed 100000021918651318 or other island seed for the best experience!

Shader used: https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader

This modpack is heavily inspired by the youtuber Wrld https://www.youtube.com/@whereswrld

**Main Features:**

🧟‍♂️ Terrifying Monsters - Encounter relentless creatures that stalk you through the night.

💧 Hydration Mechanics - Monitor your water supply; dehydration can lead to dire consequences.

🌌 Atmospheric Dread - Experience immersive soundscapes and visual effects that enhance the 
horror atmosphere.

⚔️ Increased Difficulty - Face tougher horrifying creatures as you progress.

🎭 Unique Events - Experience random horror events that keep gameplay unpredictable and thrilling.

✨ Optimized Gameplay - Enjoy smooth performance even with a multitude of mods, ensuring a seamless horror experience.


**The main mods used in the pack are:**

The Man From The Fog: https://modrinth.com/mod/the-man-from-the-fog

Arthropod Phobia Expansions + Horror Bosses / Arachnophobia: https://modrinth.com/mod/arphex

Horror Element Mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/horror-element-mod

GoatMan: https://modrinth.com/mod/goatman

The Knocker: https://modrinth.com/mod/the-knocker

Thirst was Taken: https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken

With other optimizations and quality of life mod all in one!
